issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case scenarios such as missing translations or SSR hydration mismatches.
Assumes React environment; lacks guidance for Vue or Node usage.

scenarios.name: Configure i18next with HTTP-loaded namespace JSON files
scenarios.rationale: Baseline inlines resources without HttpBackend or LanguageDetector and ignores namespaces; treatment chains all three plugins, sets supportedLngs/ns/defaultNS and the /locales/{{lng}}/{{ns}}.json loadPath, and shows useTranslation('dashboard').

scenarios.name: Pluralized project count plus a Trans-wrapped Terms link
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses an inline ternary and hardcoded link; treatment defines projects_one/projects_other with {{count}}, calls t('projects', { count }), and uses <Trans i18nKey="terms"> wrapping an <a href="/terms"> element.
